tags.note: This is a wooden marker marking the hiking path
Here I had to return to get the bus back to Reykjavík but maybe someone else has tracked the rest of the path.

tags.description: The Douglas R4D-8, a Super DC-3 of the US Navy, had to land in November 1973. All 7 crew members survived. The plane was abandoned.
tags.description:de: Die DouglasR4D-8, eine Super DC-3 der US Navy, musst hier im November 1973 landen. Alle 7 Personen der Mannschaft überlebten. Das Flugzeug wurde zurückgelassen.
tags.name: Flugvélaflak á Sólheimasandi

tags.note:
Huldujökull panoramic view
If you stay here for half an hour or so you might see big chunks of ice falling of the cliffs.

tags.fixme: path continues further, probably down to river level
